_generator.battle_record_format: +0 effect_class | +1 effect_category(1=dmg 2=status 3=heal/buff 8=item) | +2 target_mode($11=1foe $12=allfoes $21=1ally $22=allallies) | +3 ai_weight(per-skill AI score, summed by enemy AI $57) | +4 mp_cost_byte | +5 status_id(Sleep=$08 Poison=$13 Slow=$0e death=$09) | +6 damage_class($00=none $04=spell $05=breath) | +7/+8/+9 flag bitfields(presentation/anim/cast) | +11/+13 power_party_min/range, +15/+17 power_enemy_min/range (u16 LE; max=min+range; caster-side). PROVEN/HIGH: +0,+1,+2,+3,+4,+5,+6,+11,+13,+15,+17. Animation pointer is in the handler's descriptor-setter ($52:SetHLBattle_54e7 -> $dd70=$b882 for Blaze), NOT the record.
_generator.learn_record_format: +0 level u8 | +1 hp +3 mp +5 atk +7 def +9 agl +11 int (u16 LE) | +13..17 up to 5 prereq skill ids ($FF=none)

records.name: Sheldodge
records.note: ROM name 'Sheldodge' is a placeholder; this is the Bug-family cut (family code 5). FAQ calls it 'BugBlow'. patches/bank_041.asm renames the displayed string to 'BugCut'.
